(^J9lt) lfcf&fa,W&,?faFtt 37FTfn I ( v ) ^ T 4>l4$^H f^TFT^3ffM^T I (vi) sft^. *n?*f^T 3HI feW, ft^FP, Trsfta T M xr^r "gsr ftrowi—•wWl^i* i 3. ^ H ^ I ^ H ^ I ^ I ^ I arer*fcf ^fafr ^ u P ^ m sfo gflfrifU* ^mrem for i ^ ^ ^ ^ ^ f ^ ^ r T s r f t a r ™ 4. ^ 3TT^?T W T "mfV^Kt ^ a ^ i ^ T ^ "5TRt f^TI "3MT t I [ m U 15-29/2012-^K«ilH'Ml^l^l3 TT^T ^ t e , ^ ^ r ^ftrar 4714 GI/2012 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF YOUTH AFFAIRS AND SPORTS (Department of Youth Affairs) ORDER New Delhi, the 18th December, 2012 Subject: Constitution of a Transition Committee for Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development (RGNIYD). S.O. 2965(E).—Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development has been declared as an Institute of National Importance and to this effect the Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development (RGNIYD) Act, 2012 has been notified to commence w.e.f. 19-11-2012. ATransition Committee is hereby constituted for deliberating the various issues and preparing the requisite framework for the transition. The Transition Committee consists of the following members (in alphabetical order):— (i) Dr. N. R. Madhava Menon, Vice Chancellor of National Law School of India, Bangalore and NUJS, Kolkata. (ii) Prof. S. P. Parasuraman, Director, Tata Institute of Social Sciences. (iii) Shri Suman Dubey, Member, RGF, Board of Trustees and Member—Prasar Bharti. (iv) Dr. (Ms.) Syeda Hameed, Member, Planning Commission. (v) Representative from Department of Youth Affairs. (vi) Sh. P. Michael Vetha Siromony, Director, Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development— jConveror. 2. The Transition Committee may take assistance from any person, if it so desires. 3. RGNTYD shall provide all secretarial assistance and logistic support to the Transition Committee. The expenditure on travel and accommodation of the Members on their demestic visits, if any, shall also be borne by RGNIYD from its budget. 4. This Order issues with the approval of the Competent Authority. [F.No. 15-29/2012-RGNIYD] RAKESH MOHAN, Jt.
